description_long: This object is a large, robust machine gun with a long, rectangular barrel and a boxy receiver. The receiver features a green ammunition box attached to the side, and a visible belt of cartridges feeding into the chamber. The gun has a prominent handle and a trigger guard, with a metallic, industrial appearance dominated by gray and black tones. The barrel is solid and straight, with a squared-off muzzle and a vented section near the receiver for cooling. The mounting area appears reinforced, suggesting it is designed for use on a fixed support or vehicle. The overall construction is heavy-duty, with visible bolts and mechanical details indicating durability and functionality.
description: A heavy, boxy machine gun with a long barrel, side-mounted green ammo box, and visible cartridge belt, featuring robust metallic construction and industrial details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, the green ammo box, and the belt of cartridges feeding into the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off muzzle, the vented barrel section, and the alignment of the ammo belt entering the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the green ammo box, the handle, and the overall rectangular profile of the gun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the handle, and the entry point of the ammo belt.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with vented cooling section
